programme.title: Treetop Cat Rescue

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Book Of...

programme.title: Rik Mayall: Magnificent B'stard
programme.desc: A documentary tribute to the influential and much-missed comedian, a man driven by punk spirit and an unrelenting commitment to pushing boundaries. programme.title: Katie Price: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: A profile of one of Britain's most enduring celebrity figures, combining previously unseen footage with first-hand testimonies from Katie and those closest to her.

programme.title: Tina
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome.

programme.title: Vegas: The Story of Sin City
programme.desc: A look at how Las Vegas became farther removed from national attitudes, with Elvis Presley's comeback helping cement the city as an international entertainment destination.

programme.title: Vegas: The Story of Sin City
programme.desc: How the Strip exploded with new Disney-fied hotels, casinos and megastars, highlighting its evolution and continual reinvention in the face of difficulty.

programme.title: Steve McQueen: The Lost Movie
programme.desc: Documentary exploring a movie Steve McQueen began work on in the 1960s, but which was never completed.

programme.title: Red Elvis: The Cold War Cowboy
programme.desc: Documentary about an American pop star who defected to the Soviet Bloc in the 1970s, becoming a Marxist icon in Eastern Europe until his mysterious drowning in East Berlin.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Steven Spielberg, whose films include Jaws, ET the Extra-Terrestrial, Raiders of the Lost Ark and Jurassic Park and who won Oscars for directing Schindler's List and Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: The Eighties
programme.desc: A look at how MTV marked the dawn of the music video's rise, with Michael Jackson taking the artform to a new level by creating groundbreaking short films.

programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, who won an Oscar for his role in The Fugitive and also starred in The Executioner's Song, Men in Black, JFK and No Country for Old Men.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of American director David Lynch, whose films include Eraserhead, Mulholland Drive, Wild at Heart, Blue Velvet and The Elephant Man.

programme.title: The Movies
programme.desc: The journey through the history of American cinema concludes with a look at cinema from the 2000s through to the present day.

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: An account of the origins of the American Civil War, which began in 1861 when 11 southern slave states formed the Confederate States of America and declared their withdrawal from the United States. Abraham Lincoln and Jefferson Davis vied as presidents of the Union and Confederacy respectively.

programme.title: History of the Sitcom
programme.desc: A look at the development of situation comedies, tracing their evolution from the 1950s to the 21st century, beginning by looking at the depictions of families.

programme.title: Laurel and Hardy: Their Lives and Magic
programme.desc: Documentary shedding new light on the turbulent private lives of Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy and the genuine friendship between them.

programme.title: Dogtown and Z-Boys
programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of skateboarding, from its 1970s emergence as a land-based form of surfing in Los Angeles and its subsequent explosion of popularity worldwide, to its current status as a widely-practised extreme sport. Narrated by Sean Penn, with contributions from experts Jay Adams and Tony Alva.

programme.title: My Icon: Solomon Wilcots
programme.desc: The former NFL player talks about his idol.

programme.title: Val
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the daily life of actor Val Kilmer, featuring never-before-seen footage spanning 40 years.

programme.title: Wild Science
programme.desc: Following the caiman's journey from the age of dinosaurs to the modern day, where strange symbiosis and fierce maternal instincts shape its survival.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global Adventure
programme.desc: Documentary capturing some of the greatest filming sequences of David Attenborough's career, using previously unseen footage, from the deepest dives in a submersible on the Great Barrier Reef to watching a million bats take off in a cave in Borneo. Other highlights include life in the frozen tundra of South Georgia, a colony of King Penguins and the world's largest migration of Hammerhead sharks i

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global Adventure: Home Planet

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons; they'd also like to pay homage to their funeral home business.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers; with limited resources, the team members work to incorporate the comforts of city living, then they discover a moldering water tank that may shut down the renovation.

programme.desc: A Utah couple visited Oak Island and loved it so much they moved to North Carolina; after years of outings to the island, they're ready to buy and renovate their own beach home where their two young kids can grow up experiencing beach life.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: When their business manager requests a brand-new build over a vacation-packed winter, the team loses track of the budget as time slips away and snow piles up; the crew try to finish the build without going any more over budget.
